# Guarantee contract

## Guaranteed by the system

```text
All posts are hypothesis-linked.
All tests have named methods.
All variants have metric codes.
All batches have decision rules.
All scale decisions require guardrail pass.
All winners require replication unless marked exception.
All organic underexposure is handled through exposure diagnosis.
All failures are classified into signal gates.
```

## Not guaranteed

```text
specific post virality
organic platform allocation
audience mood
trend timing
competitor behaviour
identical performance across platforms
```

## Strongest possible performance guarantee

```text
If you follow the system, the probability of learning from each batch approaches 1.
The probability of scaling untested luck decreases.
The probability of identifying repeatable mechanisms increases with each properly measured batch.
```

## Legal/ethical wording

Do not claim:

```text
guaranteed viral
guaranteed views
algorithm-proof
```

Use:

```text
quality-controlled
experimentally governed
probabilistically optimised
replication-based
exposure-insured
AI-assisted but evidence-constrained
```
